entities.name: SWEET SORGHUM
entities.description: The sweet sorghum variety ICSV 93046 used in the study

entities.description: A country where the sweet sorghum variety ICSV 93046 is commercially cultivated

entities.name: PHILIPPINES
entities.description: A country where the sweet sorghum variety ICSV 93046 is commercially cultivated

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENT TREATMENTS
entities.description: Six fertilizer treatments (T1-T6) involving nitrogen, phosphorus, zinc, and boron

entities.name: POST-RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The period from December to March 2009-2010 during which the main crop was evaluated

entities.name: SUMMER SEASON
entities.description: The period from April to July 2010 during which the ratoon crop was evaluated

entities.name: MAIN CROP
entities.description: The initial plant crop evaluated in the study

entities.name: RATOON CROP
entities.description: The subsequent crop grown from the stubble of the main crop

entities.name: ANOVA
entities.description: The combined analysis of variance used to evaluate differences between crops and treatments

entities.name: SUGAR YIELD
entities.description: The qualitative and quantitative component traits measured in the study

entities.name: STALK YIELD
entities.description: A quantitative trait measured for both main and ratoon crops

entities.name: TROPICAL CONDITIONS
entities.description: The environmental conditions under which the study was conducted
